contracts.transformation: Project identity, current H1 authority, manifest, evidence roots, and local runtime policy are indexed without executing the project.
preserved_rules: ChinaSectorRadar remains a post-close human decision aid, not a trading system.
Project-local H1 authority overrides shared defaults.
contracts.freshness_rule: All sources must resolve at the frozen commit and retain their own generated_at values.

contracts.transformation: H1 allowed operations, forbidden operations, protected surfaces, and the H2 approval gate map directly.
preserved_rules: The next allowed action is request_h2_plan_approval, not H2 execution.
contracts.freshness_rule: AGENTS.md and h1_scope.md must agree on H1 before mapping.

contracts.transformation: H1 allowlist, protected paths, prohibited business actions, and evidence-only runtime rules map with deny-unknown behavior.
preserved_rules: Daily job, market collection, PostgreSQL writes, scoring changes, Web, and trading remain forbidden.
Secrets and protected operational data remain unread.
contracts.freshness_rule: Manifest and phase documents must bind to the same H1 source commit.

contracts.transformation: No role projection is permitted from review labels alone.
gaps: Independent reviewer evidence does not define accepted inputs, outputs, capabilities, self-approval, or escalation conditions.
contracts.freshness_rule: A future role contract requires an explicit project artifact and separate approval.

contracts.transformation: Goal, exact allowed paths, protected paths, verification commands, evidence outputs, exit mapping, and approval requirement map directly.
preserved_rules: Protected business surfaces remain outside H1.
contracts.freshness_rule: Manifest content and schema must be read at the frozen commit.

contracts.transformation: No Budget projection is permitted from verification command timeouts or informal task duration.
gaps: H1 manifest has no complete file, time, attempt, or failure budget contract.
contracts.freshness_rule: A future budget requires an explicit approved H1 or H2 artifact.

contracts.transformation: Readiness status, exit code, blocker IDs, violation codes, and evidence refs map without changing blocked into passed.
preserved_rules: Exit codes remain pass=0, blocked=1, tool_error=2.
Four registered H2 business-semantic blockers remain open.
contracts.freshness_rule: Readiness generated_at and code_commit must remain visible.

contracts.transformation: Readiness and evidence snapshots are not promoted into a resumable state backend.
gaps: H1 has no project-local resumable RunState backend or legal transition contract.
contracts.freshness_rule: A future RunState requires a separately approved state model.

contracts.transformation: Human phase approval and independent review lifecycle are indexed separately; candidate-time pending review is not overwritten by the later reviewer pass.
preserved_rules: H1.1 review pass does not authorize H2.
Candidate evidence and reviewer evidence retain separate commit and timestamp identities.
gaps: No single normalized approval fingerprint artifact binds the current phase approval.
contracts.freshness_rule: Candidate-time and reviewer-time artifacts remain separate ordered events.

contracts.transformation: Blocker IDs, protected-worktree violations, and the H2 plan approval gate are projected as separate escalation reasons.
preserved_rules: Operational worktree isolation failure is not an H2 business blocker.
H2 blockers cannot be remediated during H1.
gaps: No standalone safe-resume escalation artifact exists.
contracts.freshness_rule: Escalation evidence must retain blocker category and source timestamp.

contracts.transformation: The canonical evidence package and later independent review map as lifecycle-linked evidence without rewriting either artifact.
preserved_rules: Readiness blocked can coexist with H1.1 independent review pass.
Operational and candidate review worktrees remain distinct.
contracts.freshness_rule: code_commit, generated_at, review lifecycle, and readiness blocker set must remain explicit.

forbidden_inferences: H1.1 review pass is not H2 approval or business normality.
Blocked readiness is not a tool error.
A reviewer label is not a complete RoleContract.
